renderStyle.description: Diagram style preset (phase 10, step 10.12) — top-level, not per-view.

notePositions.description: Note positions (phase 10, step 10.11) — notes aren't diagram nodes, so kept separate from positions.

sizes.description: Manually-resized node dimensions (phase 11, step 11.4) — only nodes the user actually resized get an entry.

styles.description: Instance-level style overrides (phase 11, step 11.8) — only nodes the user actually styled get an entry.

edgeStyles.description: Instance-level edge style overrides (phase 11, step 11.9), keyed by link-key (e.g. "A->B:request") — only edges the user actually styled get an entry.

edgeLabelOffsets.description: Edge label drag offsets relative to the edge's own midpoint (phase 11, step 11.9), keyed by link-key — only labels the user actually dragged get an entry.

hiddenEdgeLabels.description: Link-keys whose label is individually hidden (phase 11, step 11.9), independent of any global show/hide-all view setting. Never consulted by `dc context`/AI export.

hiddenEdges.description: Link-keys whose whole connector (line + marker + label) is hidden (phase 12, step 12.7) — presentation only, never consulted by `dc context`/AI export.

hiddenNodeLabels.description: Node ids whose text label is hidden (phase 12, step 12.7) — the shape itself still renders. Never consulted by `dc context`/AI export.

textStyle.description: Instance-level text override (phase 12, step 12.5) — `align` only meaningful on a node's Style, ignored on an edge label's EdgeStyle.
